channel.title: Peter Farrar Books — Blog
channel.description: Photography insights, leadership thinking, and updates on new books and projects.

item.title: Mastering the Architecture of a Great Landscape (Part One) | Peter Farrar Books
item.description: Foundations, Form, and the Principles That Shape Lasting Design

item.title: Scaling Photography Business | Peter Farrar Books
item.description: How positioning, pricing strategy, and client experience scaled a photography business from $300 to $4,600 per wedding.

item.title: From Top Performer to Top Leader - Why Great Employees Often Struggle as Managers
item.description: Why do excellent individual contributors often struggle when promoted? Explore the mindset shift required to move from 'doing' to 'enabling'.

item.title: Good Managers vs Bad Managers: The Behaviours That Shape Every Workplace (Part Two) | Peter Farrar Books
item.description: What separates strong managers from weak ones? Explore the everyday behaviours that shape trust, performance, and retention at work.

item.title: The Zone System Explained – Part One: Seeing Light Like Ansel Adams | Peter Farrar Books
item.description: Discover how Ansel Adams' Zone System can transform your photography from recording a scene into interpreting light with intention.

item.title: The Shadow Side of Success: (Part One) | Peter Farrar Books
ITIL 4 in Practice: What Companies Expect vs Real Service Management Leadership | Peter Farrar Books
item.description: A real-world look at ITIL 4 frameworks, service desk leadership, and how culture drives ITSM success over pure theory.

item.title: The Zone System Explained - Part Two | Peter Farrar Books
item.description: Applying the Zone System in Modern Digital Photography
